description: Composition Pink and brown checked shirt with white and blue accents, made of 100% cotton with full sleeves, full front buttoned placket, buttoned flap pockets on both sides of the chest with brand name badge on left pocket flap and has a curved hemline Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash in warm water Wash only with like colours Use mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Use warm iron Stylish to the hilt, this classic combination of pink, maroon, white and blue checks adds immense style to your casual look. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt from spykar. Pair it with denims or corduroys and sports shoes to look like the king of casual wear. Model statistics The model wears size M Height: 6'; Shoulders: 18”
